arts.ttl: WATCH: The moment Gavi tells Flick to put Torre on against Valencia
arts.sum: Hansi Flick revealed after Barcelona’s huge win over Valencia that Gavi has given up a chance to come on as a substitute and had told the coach to put Pablo Torre on instead. the moment when Gavi tells Hansi Flick to put Pablo Torre instead

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe Targets Robert Lewandowski As La Liga Scoring Race Heats Up Between Clasico Rivals
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Kylian Mbappé is now just two goals behind Barcelona's Robert Lewandowski in the La Liga scoring race.
